---
title: "Interactivity in the Classroom"
description: "A seminar given the the Department of Politics, Languages & International Studies"
author: "Waleed A Ali"
date: 03/18/2026
draft: false
editor: source
categories:
    - Interactivity
---

<br>

This was a talk given the Department of Politics, Languages & International Studies on interactivity in the classroom and the possible differences in approaches between the sciences and social sciences.  The presentation can be found [here](https://computingservices-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/g/personal/waaa21_bath_ac_uk/IQBuDWxhjOHfQ4OQFFibiZuPAcxP_8O_S4IEsnCq899eT3U?e=Lm7qa9).
